name: US Cash Advance
description_short: 1002 S Miami Ave location of US Cash Advance in Miami, FL provides quick payday and title loans with extended evening hours.
description_long:
US Cash Advance at 1002 S Miami Ave, Suite 400, is a standalone storefront in downtown Miami, FL providing payday and title loans. This Miami location is open Monday through Friday 8AM–9PM and Saturday–Sunday 10AM–7PM, offering extended evening hours for working residents of Miami.

At this South Miami Avenue location, you can apply for payday loans (short-term advances against your paycheck) or title loans (secured by your vehicle) with fast approval. Call +1 786-840-9780 to discuss your loan options, ask about documentation requirements, or schedule an appointment at this Miami storefront.

If you're a Miami resident needing quick cash between paychecks, bring a valid government ID, proof of income (recent pay stub or bank statements), and banking information for deposit. US Cash Advance completes applications the same day, with funds transferred as early as the next business day.
pros: Extended weekday hours (8am–9pm Mon–Fri) and weekend availability (10am–7pm Sat–Sun)
Accepts all credit types including bad credit and no credit history
No collateral required on any advertised loan product
In-store applications reportedly completed in under 45 minutes per customer reviews
Same-day funding option available for eligible borrowers
Bad credit loan range extends up to $50,000 for larger borrowing needs
Physical storefront at Detroit location provides in-person support
cons: No APR, interest rate, or fee information disclosed anywhere on the page
Operates as a loan referral service — actual lender and terms are unknown until after inquiry
Contact email uses a staging/development server domain (kinsta.cloud), not a professional business email
Multiple customer reviews share near-identical sentence structures, raising authenticity concerns
No information about licensing, state regulatory compliance, or lender partner identities
best_for: Detroit-area residents who prefer in-person service for emergency short-term loans
Borrowers with bad or no credit who have been turned down elsewhere
Consumers needing small amounts ($100–$1,000) before their next paycheck
People who need funds same-day and can visit the physical location
diagnosis: US Cash Advance is best suited for Detroit-area consumers with poor credit who need emergency cash quickly and value in-person guidance. The main caveat is that it is a loan referral service, not a direct lender — borrowers will not know the actual APR or lender identity until after submitting their information, so comparing offers carefully before signing any contract is essential.
services: In-person loan assistance at Detroit storefront
Online inquiry and third-party lender matching
meta_description: US Cash Advance at 1002 S Miami Ave, Miami, FL. Fast payday and title loans with evening hours.
